TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Mangcelan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 164 buwan, 502 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 460 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 42 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 85%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mangcelan hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Mangcelan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Mangcelan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mangcelan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mangcelan hya' ga Lohok. tay mkyahu' na Mangcelan hya' ga Makotaay. tay 'zil na Mangcelan hya' ga Takay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Mangcelan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ maŋʦ~ʨelan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa loħok. taj mkjaħuʔ na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa makotaaj. taj ʔzil na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa takaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ maŋʦ~ʨelan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Mangcelan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 164 buwan, 502 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 460 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 42 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 85%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mangcelan hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Mangcelan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Mangcelan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mangcelan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mangcelan hya' ga Lohok. tay mkyahu' na Mangcelan hya' ga Makotaay. tay 'zil na Mangcelan hya' ga Takay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Mangcelan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ maŋʦ~ʨelan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa loħok. taj mkjaħuʔ na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa makotaaj. taj ʔzil na maŋʦ~ʨelan ħjaʔ ɣa takaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ maŋʦ~ʨelan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
